Package index

Main Functions

FastQDesign()
FastQDesign
SamplePrep()
Prepare a sample
SampleMatch()
Match Downsample to Reference
DownSample()
Down Sample a Seurat object
FindPseudotime()
Find Pseudotime for Seurat Object

Analysis Utilities

ConditionalShannonEntropy()
Conditional Shannon Entropy
Entropy()
Entropy
ExtractMTX()
Extract metadata from mtx.gz file
FindAllMarkersByCondition()
Find Markers By Condition
FixedNumClusters()
Customize Cluster Number
JaccardIndex()
Jaccard Index
MarkerGeneFilter()
DE Markers Filters
OptimalNumClusters()
Find the optimal number of cell clusters for Seurat object
PPV()
Positive Predictive Value(PPV)
RootNodeSelect()
Root Node Selection for cell_data_set

fastF Subcommands

fastF_freq()
Find Cell Barcode Whitelist from FastQ
fastF_filter()
Filter FastQ Files Using Whitelist
fastF_crb()
Extract CR/CB Tags from BAM
fastF_bam2db()
Convert BAM to SQLite UMI Matrix
fastF_extract()
Extract Custom Tags from BAM
